ddls:
CREATE TABLE "corporations" (
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporation */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the corporation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the corporation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the corporation */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the corporation */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the corporation */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the corporation was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO or top executive */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the corporation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidies" (
  "subsidy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsidy record */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation receiving the subsidy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the subsidy was granted */,
  "subsidy_source" TEXT /* Source of the subsidy (local, state, multiple) */,
  "subsidy_value" REAL /* Value of the subsidy */,
  "loan_bailout_value" REAL /* Value of any loan or bailout associated */,
  "subsidy_type" TEXT /* Type of subsidy (e.g., MEGADEAL, grant, tax increment financing) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the subsidy became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the subsidy expires */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions or requirements for the subsidy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the subsidy */,
  "industry_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the subsidy on the industry */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the subsidy */,
  "social_impact" TEXT /* Social impact of the subsidy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsidy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidies_subsidy_source FOREIGN KEY ("subsidy_source") REFERENCES subsidy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidies_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidies_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES subsidy_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidies_subsidy_type FOREIGN KEY ("subsidy_type") REFERENCES subsidy_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsidy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsidy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsidy type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the subsidy type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the subsidy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsidy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsidy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsidy source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the subsidy source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the subsidy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidy_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the subsidies were granted */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year in which the subsidies were granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "subsidy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsidy record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the subsidy record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_subsidy_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsidy_id") REFERENCES subsidies ("subsidy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
